caption: The video captures a man performing live music in front of an audience. He is seated and playing an acoustic guitar while singing into a microphone. The performer is dressed in a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate embroidery, including a red design on the chest. His hair is tied back, and he wears glasses. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows behind him. The audience, visible in the foreground, is attentively watching and listening to his performance. The atmosphere suggests a small, intimate concert or gathering, possibly in a community center or similar venue. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen.
